name: onemem-codex
description: OneMem for Codex - decentralized memory tools (store/search/recall) encrypted on Walrus via MemWal

interface.longDescription: Save, search, and recall portable OneMem memories through MCP. Memories are client-side encrypted (Seal) and stored on Walrus via MemWal — the relayer never sees plaintext, and the memory is owned by you across runtimes. Optional lifecycle hooks stream readable session observations to a live local dashboard.
defaultPrompt: Search OneMem for prior context before implementing this.
Save this decision to OneMem memory.
Recall what we decided about this from OneMem.
